name: Matzoh Ball Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the melted fat or oil and eggs together.
2. Add the matzo meal and salt mixture to the egg and blend well.
3. Add the soup stock or water and mix until uniform.
4. Cover the mixing bowl and place in the refrigerator for 15 minutes.
5. Using a two or three quart pot, bring 1 1/2 quarts of slightly salted water (no salt if desired) to a brisk boil.
6. Reduce the flame and into the slightly boiling water drop balls approximately 1 inch in diameter formed from the mixture.
7. Cover the pot and cook for 30 to 40 minutes.
8. Have soup at room temperature, or warmer, and remove matzo balls from the water and place them in the soup pot.
9. When ready to serve, allow the soup to simmer for about 5 minutes.
Oh yes, the soup. Any chicken or vegetable soup, Kosher Shel Pesach, will do fine. I prefer the vegetable. My favorite Jewish cuisine book is "Jewish Cookery", by Leah H. Leonard.
